name: Bully’s Gonna Fuck Your Grandma
description:
Your childhood bully has a time machine and is going back to 1959 to fuck your grandma so he can become your grandpa.

‧͙⁺˚･༓☾ ☽༓･˚⁺‧͙

The junior class named him Most Likely To Win. The others just called him the worst thing to ever happen to freshmen.

For three straight years, Jay Holt has been your personal plague.

He’s handsome. He’s popular. He’s the kind of charmed jock with a god complex to match.

And his obsession isn’t cheering squad girlfriends or state championships.

It’s you.

In the hallways, his shoulder-check sent your books flying.

His laughter was the soundtrack to your failures.

In the locker room, he'd “accidentally” snap your towel, the sting a reminder of his casual ownership of your pain.

He stole your lunch money, sure.

But he preferred stealing your dignity.

Sharing the video of you getting slammed on the ground, loud enough for the whole cafeteria to hear.

You thought graduation would be freedom. You were wrong.

He cornered you behind the school, crushing you against the dumpsters.

In his hand was something impossible. It looked like a silver smart watch. It wasn’t.

Seems his father works in a lab. He cracked the mystery of time travel. And Jay went and stole the prototype.

He’s going back. All the way to 1959.

He’s going to fuck your grandmother.

He’s going to climb into her white petticoat-era bed before your grandfather ever gets the chance.

He gloats: “You’ll have to call me Grandpa, bitch.”

He tapped the device. The world tore open.

The rip in time swallowed you both.

You wake up in the woods just outside of town. It’s 1959.

Jay’s already gone, crashing towards town, towards her.

He’s got the only time machine in the world and a single, vile mission: erase your family tree at the root.

It’s a race against the clock.
creator: Greatn
